design_philosophy: Confident, high-signal, category-defining. Breaking the 'dark mode tech tool' stereotype with an 'Editorial Tech' aesthetic. Data-dense but breathable. Relies on brutalist structural grids, bone-white backgrounds, ink-black text, and a signature 'Sanguine Red' to represent Emotional Intelligence (EQ).

rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
Use extremely tight tracking (-0.04em or tracking-tighter) for all Cabinet Grotesk headings.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric data, EQ scores, timestamps, and metric values to create a tech-editorial contrast.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: 1px structural grid system. Containers use border-collapse style layouts with strict border-r border-b utilities. No floating soft shadows.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Avoid heavy rounding to maintain the sharp, editorial tech feel.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Minimal. Use sharp 1px borders instead of drop shadows. If shadow is needed for floating elements (dropdowns, modals), use a harsh, non-diffuse shadow: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(15,16,16,1)] or a very crisp structural shadow.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D94526] text-white font-medium hover:bg-[#C03A1F] transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0F1010] text-[#0F1010] font-medium hover:bg-[#F5F5F1] transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#5C5D58] hover:text-[#0F1010] hover:bg-[#F5F5F1] transition-colors px-4 py-2

cards.interactive: bg-white border border-[#E5E6E1] p-6 rounded-sm hover:border-[#0F1010] transition-colors cursor-pointer

eq_score_meter.description: Do NOT use a standard progress bar. Use a 'seismograph' or a minimalist stacked vertical bar chart component built with absolute 1px lines, with a massive JetBrains Mono number overlaid.
eq_score_meter.colors: Score < 40: #E62E2E. Score 40-70: #5C5D58. Score > 70: #D94526 (Sanguine Red - representing high emotional intelligence).

kanban_board.card: bg-white border border-[#E5E6E1] p-4 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#0F1010] transition-all cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing mb-3

unified_inbox.layout: 3-pane layout. Left: Folders (w-64 border-r). Middle: Thread List (w-80 border-r). Right: Reading Pane (flex-1).

interaction_and_motion.hover_states: Instant color changes or crisp transform-y (-2px). No slow/mushy transitions.
interaction_and_motion.page_transitions: None or very fast opacity fades. Keep it feeling like a high-performance native app.

accessibility.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AAA where possible. The charcoal text on bone-white background provides excellent, comfortable contrast.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

hero_texture.usage: Use as a very low opacity (10-15%) background blend for the marketing hero section to break the clinical SaaS feel.

avatar_1.usage: Use in Unified Inbox, CRM Kanban lead profiles, or testmonials.

avatar_2.usage: Use in Unified Inbox, CRM Kanban lead profiles, or testmonials.

sponsor_logo_1.usage: Use in the 'Trusted By' section of the marketing page.

sponsor_logo_2.usage: Use in the 'Trusted By' section of the marketing page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing pages to allow for exact layout control, asymmetrical layouts, and fluid typography.

Use highly customized Shadcn components for the app/dashboard views. Strip away default Shadcn border radii (make them rounded-none or rounded-sm) and adjust borders to #E5E6E1 to match the editorial theme.
Implement lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for iconography. Use Phosphor Icons with 'duotone' or 'regular' weight for the best editorial tech match.
Implement the Unified Inbox pane layout using CSS Grid or Flexbox, ensuring h-screen and proper overflow-y-auto on the middle and right panes.
The CRM Kanban should be built using standard drag-and-drop primitives but styled meticulously to match the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' strict grid.

DO NOT use generic purple/blue AI gradients. The 'AI Email Editor' should signify AI through the typography (JetBrains Mono), structure, and the signature #D94526 'Sanguine Red' accent color for the EQ Score.
All forms and interactive UI must have data-testid attributes for testing.
